SEARCH

Uses of Interface
org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion.StopCriterion

Packages that use StopCriterion
Package
Description
org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion
Provides interfaces and classes for defining termination criteria (stop criteria) for search processes.

  • Uses of StopCriterion in org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion

    Subinterfaces of StopCriterion in org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AstarStopCriterion
    Interface representing a stop criterion specifically for A* search variants.
    interface 
    DdoStopCriterion
    Interface representing a stop criterion specifically for Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) solvers.
    Methods in org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion that return StopCriterion
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxFrontierSize(int maxNodes)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the frontier size exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxIter(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxIterSinceLastImprovement(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain number of iterations.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxIterWithoutGapImprovement(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations without any gap improvement exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxTime(long maxTimeMs)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the total runtime exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.maxTimeSinceLastImprovement(long maxTimeMs)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain amount of time.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.minGap(double gapPercent)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the optimality gap is less than or equal to a specified threshold.
    static StopCriterion
    StopCriterion.minRelativeImprovement(double threshold)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the relative improvement between the current incumbent and the previous incumbent is less than or equal to a threshold.
